platform.name: EOD Operator Readiness Platform
platform.tagline: Train the human behind the robot — decisions, stress, and remote precision.

missions.name: Chapter I — John's Last Signal
missions.description: John is zip-tied beside a VOIED. Remote wire RSP is your only option.

story.briefing: John is in a dangerous situation — he cannot move. A victim-operated device is tied to his breathing.
story.distress_call: HELP! They're zip-tied to me — I can't move! The device is wired to my chest!
story.operator_reply: Hold on, John. EOD is inbound. Don't struggle — we're coming for you.
story.task: Point green fingertip at each wire cut zone — hold steady. Follow analysis order in manual.
story.success: John extracted alive. Device rendered safe.

missions.wire_cut_brief: Serial odd — isolate firing circuit before safe lines.

wire_labels.RED: Firing circuit — tied to chest plate
wire_labels.BLUE: Safe return — cut after RED isolated
wire_labels.GREEN: Power feed — final cut renders safe

missions.name: Chapter II — School Evacuation Code
missions.description: A command-wire device blocks the evacuation route. Enter the disarm code remotely.

story.briefing: Elena locked herself in the admin office. The device keypad must be entered without triggering the command wire.
story.distress_call: The evacuation alarm won't stop! There's a device on the door — forty students are behind me!
story.operator_reply: Copy, Elena. Stay calm. We'll clear the route remotely. Nobody moves until I say.
story.task: Deploy UGV, hold target on keypad digits 4-7-2-9 in order.
story.success: Evacuation route cleared. Elena and 40 students reach the cordon.

missions.name: Chapter III — Bridge Timer Panel
missions.description: Marcus is on a suspension bridge. Disable the timer screws before the window closes.

story.briefing: Marcus is trapped on the catwalk. Three anti-tamper screws must be turned in sequence with a steady remote tool.
story.distress_call: The timer's counting down! I'm on the catwalk — one wrong move and this whole bridge goes!
story.operator_reply: Marcus, stay put. Steady hands on my end. We neutralize this together.
story.task: Hold teleop tool steady on each screw point — do not rush.
story.success: Timer neutralized. Marcus crosses to the EOD team.

missions.name: Chapter IV — Embassy Frequency Lock
missions.description: Diplomat Sarah Kane needs you to align the RF detonator frequency under comms lag.

story.briefing: Sarah cannot leave the room. The RF receiver must be tuned to the safe frequency, then locked with a pinch.
story.distress_call: They're listening on every frequency! If this detonates, the whole compound is gone!
story.operator_reply: Sarah, I've got the RF chain. Align and lock — you're not dying in that room.
story.task: Move index finger to align the frequency bar, hold steady, then pinch to lock.
story.success: RF chain broken. Sarah escorted to the safe room.

missions.name: Chapter V — Hospital Pressure Plate
missions.description: Nurse David Chen stands on a pressure plate. Release must be slow and deliberate.

story.briefing: David cannot step off the plate. Open your palm to simulate weight transfer, then pinch the remote release.
story.distress_call: I can't step off! Three patients are on gurneys — the plate is under my feet!
story.operator_reply: David, breathe. Weight transfer on my mark. Nobody else gets hurt today.
story.task: Open palm 1.5s (pressure hold), then pinch release button.
story.success: Plate disarmed. David and three patients evacuated.

missions.name: Chapter VI — Metro Switch Sequence
missions.description: Transit worker Ana is in a tunnel. Flip interlock switches in the correct story order.

story.briefing: Ana is pinned by debris near a dual-initiation device. Flip switches POWER, VENT, DRAIN, SAFE in order.
story.distress_call: The tunnel's flooding! Wrong switch and we're both dead — please, hurry!
story.operator_reply: Ana, listen to my voice only. POWER, VENT, DRAIN, SAFE. I've got you.
story.task: Point and pinch each switch label in sequence — wrong switch detonates.
story.success: Interlock cleared. Ana reaches the platform with the EOD team.

missions.name: Chapter VII — Chemical Dual Trigger
missions.description: Two chemists need simultaneous dual-hand remote triggers disarmed.

story.briefing: Li and Omar are held between two mirrored triggers. Both virtual hands must pinch L and R targets at once.
story.distress_call: DON'T TOUCH ONE WITHOUT THE OTHER! Dual triggers — both of us are wired in!
story.operator_reply: Both hands, both triggers, one motion. Like Leon said — no half measures.
story.task: Use BOTH hands — pinch left and right targets simultaneously.
story.success: Dual trigger neutralized. Reactor vented safely.

missions.name: Chapter VIII — Command Center Siege
missions.description: Full incident: switches, wires, and keypad under degraded comms.

story.briefing: James is the last operator in the CP. Complete switch bypass, wire RSP, then enter abort code 1-9-8.
story.distress_call: COMMAND POST IS COMPROMISED! Full sequence or we lose everyone on this net!
story.operator_reply: James, this is your EOD operator. Full sequence, full control. Control is yours.
story.task: Three-stage defusal: switches → wires → keypad. All under comms lag and AI bad advice.
story.success: Command post secured. Full operator certification granted.
